response.original_title: I Want to be as Beautiful as the Ocean
response.overview: The ocean has always held a special place in my heart. After watching an excerpt with Hunter Schafer from one of her television series, it inspired me to make a short documentary; capturing the beauty of the ocean and wildlife. Full quote:  "But then I think about beautiful things that are also broad and deep and thick, and I think of something like the ocean. I think that I want to be as beautiful as the ocean. 'Cause the ocean's strong as fuck, and feminine as fuck. Like both are what makes the ocean the ocean."
response.title: I Want to be as Beautiful as the Ocean
